ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY AN ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Plaintiff Benjamin Graves appeared in pro per.
Defendant William Donagh aka William Francis appeared in pro per.

No hearing held.

Defendant did not provide sufficient notice that he is contesting the tentative the ruling and simply said that an appearance will be made.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY AN ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE

is GRANTED.

Proposed order signed and filed this day.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
